channel.title: solid-liquid equilibria; solubility curves; nickel and cobalt nitrate hexahydrate; ice liquidus; quasi-ideal model; solid solutions on LMI

item.title: Linear Behaviour In Isothermal Equilibria Involving Saturated Electrolyte Solutions: The H2O-Co(No3)(2)-Ni(No3)(2) Ternary System At Low Temperature
